title: IMD Weather Alert: Heavy Rain, Thunderstorms Likely In Parts Of North India; Hailstorms To Hit Punjab & Rajasthan
description: IMD weather alert as a strong western disturbance brings heavy rain and snowfall in Kashmir, thunderstorms across J&K, Himachal, and Uttarakhand, and hailstorms in Punjab and Rajasthan. Expect gusty winds and temperature drop; check latest weather update and affected areas.
